text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm looking for a<n>suitable place
outside the academy to<n>train...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Golshi the Great is here! Ta-daaah!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
In the same manner that tea demands<n>desserts
and pike demands grated<n>daikon radish... a
demon castle<n>demands a final dungeon!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's an unbeatable pairing! Just like<n>our
brotherhood!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I feel ya. "Life's a labyrinth."<n>That's what
King Golshi the First said<n>a real long time ago.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But don't you worry! Leave it to me!<n>I'll get you
the greatest dungeon ever!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
For I am Uma Lord Golshi! And I'll<n>become
Dungeon King too! Come with<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what her obsession<n>with dungeons
is all about, but I tag<n>along with her until we end
up at...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ah! What a wonderful city of water!<n>The perfect
domain for me to rule<n>over!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So it's settled?! An underwater<n>dungeon?!
Omigosh, lil’ ol' Golshi<n>here just doesn't know
what to do!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, this isn't the sea. It's my secret<n>fishing
spot. Well, guess it's not much<n>of a secret
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah, a fisher-uma. Shall I add you to<n>my party?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure, pal. So what's all this dungeon<n>talk? You
building an amusement park<n>or something?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: We do have the weather for it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ah, no kidding. Makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, this is Golshi we're talking<n>about here.
You can't go overthinking<n>these things.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aw yeah! Looks like another sweet<n>spot for a
dungeon! Ugh, an Uma<n>Lord's work is never
done. Next, I<n>say! NEXT!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
M'kay, I'll hold down the fort here,<n>then. See ya
later, O great Uma Lord!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What does a dungeon need, you ask?<n>Why, a
battlefield on which to<n>challenge the final boss!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And it's gotta be real spacious so<n>your voice
echoes around needlessly.<n>
Yodel-ay-hee-hooooo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey, Golshi! You're making a ruckus!Some people are trying to train, sostop getting in the—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You! You're—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, hold up, I've gotta think of a<n>role for you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There you go, spouting more<n>nonsense... This
isn't a playground,<n>you know.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Where I come from, them're<n>fightin' words!
Do you quarrel,<n>ma'am? Eh? EH?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship looks ready to launch into<n>either a
sumo bout or a pro wrestling<n>match against King
Halo.
choice_data_list: O great Uma Lord, you mustn't fight here.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. This place ain't even big<n>enough for me to
build a cas—wait.<n>This might be a good spot for
training,<n>though, y'know?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Have I been speaking to a brick wall<n>this whole
time?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As we continue the search for the<n>right place to
build a dungeon, we<n>travel to all kinds of places.
In the<n>end...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Man, I just can't decide on a spot.<n>They're all
amazing. Bruh, the<n>world's so purdy...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But I can't build a castle without a<n>dungeon! Gah,
what's a gal to do?!
choice_data_list:
Why don't you just build castles in all those
places?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Say what now?! A mobile castle,<n>y'say?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So it's gotta be one that transforms,<n>huh? ...Yeah,
I can make that work.<n>Might as well make it
shoot laser<n>beams and fly too!
choice_data_list: No, that's not what I sa—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm going with your idea! A mobile<n>castle! You
can leave the driving to<n>yours truly, the genius,
Golshi the<n>Great!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's eyes sparkle as the<n>plans for her
dream castle expand<n>ever further in her mind.
